payload.label: cabinet
payload.long_description: Partial, edge-cropped dark brown wooden cabinet front with horizontal molded panels and lower drawer-like recesses, slightly worn stained finish and uneven lighting; appears to be the lower front/base of a cabinet, approximately 0.8 m from the camera.
